dialogueChunks.intro: The line held. The people they protected made it through. And the ones who held it are being carried home.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} organized a ceremony. Every name was read aloud. {quest_ally} says their example has inspired volunteers to take up the watch.
dialogueChunks.outro: You kept their sacrifice from being wasted, {player_name}. The ideal lives because they did. And because you helped.

playerResponses.text: Their names should never be forgotten.
Next time, send reinforcements instead of eulogies.

dialogueChunks.intro: They survived. Barely. They can't work the way they used to, but they walked out of the {quest_focus} on their own two feet. Everyone they were protecting lived.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They said the strangest thing when it was over: 'I didn't do it for them. I did it because the alternative was being someone I couldn't live as.' {target_npc} is arranging for their care. The families they saved have offered to help.
dialogueChunks.outro: Not every sacrifice ends in death, {player_name}. Sometimes it just costs you everything you were, and you have to figure out who you are with what's left.

playerResponses.text: They're the bravest person I've ever heard of.
Make sure they're cared for. They've earned that much.
The system that put them in that position needs to change.

dialogueChunks.intro: What they protected survived. Every piece, every record, every life they were guarding. Safe.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The person who started it all was found afterward. Half-starved but alive. When {quest_ally} told them everything was safe, they just nodded and said 'Good.' {target_npc} is already making sure the work continues.
dialogueChunks.outro: The {quest_stakes} survived because one person decided it was worth more than comfort, safety, and possibly their life. You made sure that decision counted, {player_name}.

playerResponses.text: What they protected can't be destroyed now. They made sure of that.
Just keep it safe this time.
